STATEMENT OF REGISTRATION OF FOREIGN/CALIFORNIA SUPPORT ORDER

DISCOVERY 610, DREXEL A. BRADSHAW APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, THE MOTION TO COMPEL THE ATTENDANCE OF JASMINE DE LA FUENTE TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS JASMINE DE LA FUENT TO CONTACT COUNSEL FOR MARCO PEDROZA WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER TO SCHEDULE HER DEPOSITION. FAILURE TO APPEAR AT DEPOSITION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $566.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER. (610/BCHAN)
MOTION TO MODIFY HAD BEEN MISCALENDARED IN 403 AND CORRECTED TO ROOM 416.
